Specifies a dependency on "pebble-tool" version 4.4-beta4 or higher.

# Purpose
The content specifies a dependency requirement for a software project. It indicates that the project requires the `pebble-tool` package with a version of at least `4.4-beta4`. This ensures that the necessary features and fixes in `pebble-tool` are available for the project.
